title: Finite Cubic Spline Interpolation Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite cubic spline interpolation bad value QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact rational natural cubic spline replay for knots 0,1,2 with values 0,1,0 computes spline_value = 11/16 at x=1/2, while a malformed row claims spline_value = 3/4, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional spline rows only when they add distinct nonuniform-knot, boundary-condition, continuity, shape-preservation, floating-point, or theorem-reconstruction pressure; keep general spline existence, uniqueness, error estimates, and convergence claims in future Lean or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed knots, sample values, second derivatives, piece polynomials, knot values, first derivatives, second derivatives, and midpoint values as deterministic rational replay obligations.
Route the false spline value through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact value.
Expose the pack through derivative, polynomial, calculus, real-analysis, numerical-analysis, and learner query surfaces.

Keep spline existence, uniqueness, error estimates, shape preservation, monotonicity guarantees, convergence, floating-point evaluation, and general approximation theory marked as future Lean or numerical-honesty work until formal routes exist.
